search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopdevicesbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup name network.id usage.total usage.percentage | rename name as "Device Name", usage.percentage as usage_percentage | eval Percentage=round(usage_percentage,2) | stats avg(Percentage) as "Percentage", values(clients.counts.total) as "Client Count" by "Device Name" | sort - 0 "Percentage"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopdevicesbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup name network.id usage.total usage.percentage | rename network.name as "Network Name" | stats sum(usage.total) as "Total Usage" by "Network Name" | sort 10 - "Total Usage"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopdevicesbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup name network.id usage.total usage.percentage | search network.name="$click.value$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopdevicesbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup name network.id usage.total usage.percentage | rename name as "Device Name" | timechart span=1h sum(usage.total) as "Total Usage" by "Device Name"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:summarytopdevicesbyusage" $orgid$ | dedup name network.id usage.total usage.percentage | search name="$click.name2$"&earliest=$earliest$&latest=$latest$
